title: Trailer
description: Make Minecraft Look and Feel Like Trailer
body:
# TRAILER
This modpack contains resource packs That makes the game looks like a trailer This includes:
- Entity Model Features (Required for Fresh Animations)
- Entity Texture feature (Also for Fresh Animations)
- Bare Bones
- Bare Bones - Better Leaves
- Cloth Config API
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Fabric API
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Sodium

This modpack will make Minecraft Look like a trailer it doesn't have much features, it just changes things visually, but it makes the game **simple** and 
**beautiful** You could download this if you want to make the game look like a trailer, you could also film a video using this.


**Note: All of these mods and resource packs are required for this modpack in order to run.**
